description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a futuristic, stealth-inspired design, featuring sharply defined surfaces and a low-profile fuselage. The nose is pointed and tapers smoothly into the main body, while the wings are broad, sharply swept, and integrated into the fuselage with minimal dihedral. The rear section includes twin vertical stabilizers that are canted outward, giving the tail a distinctive look. The surface appears uniformly dark and matte, suggesting a radar-absorbing material or paint. There are three visible circular exhaust ports at the rear, indicating a jet propulsion system, and the cockpit is set low and forward, with a small, angular canopy. No landing gear is visible, implying it may be retracted or not modeled.
description: A dark, angular, stealth-style airplane with swept wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a pointed nose. The surface is matte and smooth, with three jet exhausts at the rear and a low, forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide angular wings, and three circular jet exhausts at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sharply swept wings, low-profile fuselage, and the forward-set cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin canted vertical stabilizers and the three prominent jet exhausts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angular wing and tail configuration with the pointed nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; integrated into the fuselage for a stealth profile.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines, visible as three circular exhausts at the back.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration, no horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible; likely retractable or not modeled.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small, angular canopy integrated into the fuselage.
